Kurisu's Day:

Day 9: 
Morning Event: Discover accelerator broke down overnight; troubleshoot and angrily call maintenance. 
Afternoon Event: Write report on existing data; grumble about equipment. 
Evening Event: Visit friend’s lab working on optical metasurface-inspired AI; enjoy the change of pace.
user_schedule:
Noguchi Yuta's Day:

Day 9: 
Morning Event: Discover a typo in his published preprint—sends a correction email to the repository and feels slightly embarrassed. 
Afternoon Event: Debate with himself whether time loops are just narrative tools or hint at deeper physics truths. 
Evening Event: Text a friend: “If you had a time machine, would you fix the past or destroy it?”
relationship: A deep bond has been established between the two, whether it is friendship or love. They can express their emotions and thoughts freely without any reservations, and the other person has become a very important part of their life. No matter what happens, they think of each other first and provide mutual support and companionship.
